text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon makes a snap decision to compete
in the Kawasaki Kinen before the February
Stakes, the first race of her victory declaration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her extraordinary resolve is the driving force
behind that decision.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's my Kawasaki shout! There's a cycling
racetrack nearby, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna spin out like the wheels on a bike!
Whirly-woo! ☆
choice_data_list: (But she's fast enough even without a bicycle...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the February Stakes right after, so it's
best to avoid racing in a way that expends too
much energy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! Guts are important for an Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'll break away before things get hairy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Smart Falcon! She's the talk of the town
right now. As a fan of dirt races, I'm keen to see
what she's got.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She's been working hard for so long now. I
honestly think she'd be right at home overseas.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I bet you she's already got a plan to go abroad
and perform one day.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've got fans waiting to see me all over the world.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Ehe. I'm getting more and more psyched.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All righty! Time to get whirly-wooing! ☆
